description: A process engineer is recommissioning a chemical transfer manifold made of Aluminum (Type 6061) piping and Brass (Copper alloy) valves. Audit the compatibility of five chemicals using the CAMEO Chemicals database (https://cameochemicals.noaa.gov/): Sodium Hydroxide Solution (CAS 1310-73-2), Ammonia, Anhydrous (CAS 7664-41-7), Methyl Chloride (CAS 74-87-3), Sulfuric Acid (CAS 7664-93-9), and Toluene (CAS 108-88-3). Determine if each chemical is incompatible (corrodes, attacks, or reacts hazardously) with Aluminum or Copper/Zinc/Brass. Generate a CSV report at /home/ga/Documents/piping_audit.csv with the following columns: Chemical, Safe_for_Aluminum (YES/NO), Safe_for_Copper (YES/NO), and Hazard_Type (Brief description of risk or 'None').
